Surgeries

I hold regular appointment advice surgeries at my office or online. If you would like to make an appointment please email me by clicking here.

Street Surgeries

I regularly have street surgeries across the constituency, where you can come and speak to me about your concerns.

Upcoming Street Surgeries:

  • Please get in touch to ask when our next street surgery will be near you
